name: web-search
label: SearXNG Web Search
description: Search the web via self-hosted SearXNG. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets. No API key needed.

name: url-fetch
label: Jina URL Fetcher
description: Fetch any URL and return clean Markdown text.

name: code-run
label: Piston Code Sandbox
description: Execute code in a secure sandbox. Supports Python, JS, Go, Rust, and more.
